backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the pastebin backend with paste creation, retrieval, expiration, password protection, user profiles, and legacy ID compatibility, using blob storage and access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the frontend expiration-check-before-download feature is implemented in PasteViewPage.tsx and useQueries.ts with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, utility, and page in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component providing hash-based routing to CreatePastePage, HistoryPage, or PasteViewPage, wrapped with QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared page layout with a sticky header containing the logo, a History link for authenticated users, a login button, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/ErrorState.tsx: Reusable error display component that renders an icon, title, message, and optional paste ID or detail block for expired, not-found, or generic error states.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that triggers Internet Identity login or logout, shows a loading spinner during login, and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/PasteEditModal.t: A modal dialog component for editing an existing paste, supporting text editing, new file uploads with progress tracking, password management, and expiration extension.
frontend/src/components/UploadProgressSt: A UI component that displays file upload progress with a spinner, filename, progress bar, and percentage for multi-file uploads.
frontend/src/config/pasteLimits.ts: Exports file size limit constants (50MB) used across the application for paste file validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for creating, fetching, editing, and managing pastes against the ICP backend, including file upload with progress callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and shared card utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePastePage.tsx: The main page for creating a new paste, handling text input, file selection, password protection, expiration selection, and displaying the resulting shareable URL.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Displays a user's paste history with loading/error/empty states, and allows editing pastes via a modal. Requires authentication to view.
frontend/src/pages/PasteViewPage.tsx: Renders a single paste's content and file downloads, performing expiration checks before serving files and showing appropriate error states for expired or missing pastes.
frontend/src/utils/actorFactory.ts: Provides factory functions to create anonymous or authenticated ICP backend actors, avoiding the double-configuration warning by passing identity only through agentOptions.
frontend/src/utils/backendError.ts: Normalizes raw backend errors into user-friendly messages and flags whether the error is authentication-related.
frontend/src/utils/draftEditorDiagnostic: Suppresses non-blocking 'draft-editor:error disallowed origin' console warnings injected by the Caffeine hosting platform's preview system.
frontend/src/utils/fileDownload.ts: Provides utilities to compute safe download filenames (inferring extensions from MIME types) and to trigger browser downloads from ExternalBlob objects.
frontend/src/utils/formatRemainingTime.t: Converts a nanosecond bigint duration into a human-readable remaining-time string (e.g., '1 hr 10 min', '3 days').
frontend/src/utils/pasteIds.ts: Provides validation, normalization, and extraction helpers for paste IDs, supporting both legacy numeric and GUID formats.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), typography, container queries, animate plugins, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a pastebin app fix request focused on enforcing real-time expiration checks on file/image downloads both on the frontend (PasteViewPage.tsx) and backend (blocking expired attachment retrieval).
